---
title: "Annette's R Blog" 
description: 
  I am an enthusiastic {{< iconify simple-icons r >}} user. In this blog, I highlight my preferred features of {{< iconify simple-icons r >}} through practical examples.
  You will find concise data analysis and visualization projects, each accompanied by fully reproducible {{< iconify simple-icons r >}} code.
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: grid 
  categories: true
---
